adversary-thin — a THIN delivery package that FAILS `gate-check adversary`.

The CONTRACT declares a state machine with two failure states, and the epic
asserts both (D-B1 clean) plus the two easy cascade classes (recovery/resume,
adversarial-verify). But the three hard classes — partial-failure,
rollback/compensation, failed-recovery→escalation — are silently absent.
Expected: exit 1, naming exactly those three missing classes. This is the
"v3 field-trial arm" shape the D4 gate is built to catch.

Dot-prefixed so gate-check's collectMdFiles walker skips it.
